violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Containers throughout kitchen and coolers were not dated or labeled.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Containers in walk-in cooler covered with plastic wrap. Needs to have impervioux and nonabsorbent covers.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as needed. - Soda fountain in need of cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
